What I Can Do For You?

Services

Full Stack Development

The building of complete websites, from the parts users see to the databases that store information. This ensures every digital product is fast, secure, and easy to use.

HTMLCSSPHPJavaScriptPythonMySQLPostgreSQLLaravelDjangoReactNode.js

Workflow Automation

The setup of smart tools that handle boring, repetitive tasks automatically. This saves hours of manual work so teams can focus on more important goals.

N8NZapierMake.com (Integromat)Python scriptingAPI integrations

Search Engine Optimization

The improvement of website setups so they show up higher in search results. This helps more of the right customers find and visit the site.

Keyword researchon-page optimizationtechnical SEOlink buildingcontent strategy

CRM

The organization of systems that track every lead and customer interaction in one place. This makes sure no follow-up is forgotten and every client stays organized.

HubSpotNotionSalesforceZoho CRMPipedriveMonday.comClickupZoho

Recruitment

The management of the hiring process to find and vet the best people for the job. This simplifies everything from the first post to the final hire.

Job postingcandidate sourcingresume screeninginterview schedulingonboarding
